rules.message: The '## Acceptance Criteria' section MUST be a Markdown checklist (- [ ] ...) with at least three items, including one edge-case item.
Every acceptance-criteria item MUST be a testable, user-facing statement (Given/When/Then or 'The user can ...'), not an implementation note.
The '## User Story' section MUST follow the form 'As a <persona>, I want <capability>, so that <outcome>.' with all three slots filled.
The '## Effort Estimate' section MUST be one of 'S', 'M', 'L', or 'Unknown', followed by a one-sentence justification. 'Unknown' MUST come with at least one entry under '## Open Questions'.
The '## Stakeholders' section MUST contain real @handles taken from the issue or its comments, OR the literal placeholder '- (none identified)'. Do NOT invent handles.
If a GitHub MCP call returned no results, the draft MUST say so explicitly. The generator MUST NOT fabricate issue content, comments, linked PRs, or stakeholders.
The whole draft MUST stay under 450 words.
